description: Lightweight and stylish, the fila Rakett fitness shoes are designed to offer a comfortable work out experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. The footwear also comes with an extra pair of laces to go with your style.Upper Synthetic upper with suede patchwork for extended durability Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay around toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Synthetic laces for durability Lightly padded tongue with synthetic upper overlay for durability and cotton fabric lining below for comfort and breathability Brand name on side and tongue Ankle support with contrast fabric lining Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Outsole Carbon rubber outsole in grids for added grip on rough terrains shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
